name: debate_workflow_builder_improvement
outcome_goal: Determine the best approach to improve the agentic workflow builder

jobs.label: d1_r1_position_a
jobs.prompt:
Read /Users/nate/Praxis/artifacts/debates/2026-04-06/workflow_builder_improvement/CONTEXT.md for full context.

Take POSITION A: The instant client-side parser should be made smarter with better NLP heuristics. No LLM needed. The speed advantage of instant generation is the killer feature. Argue for improving regex/heuristic approach with better step boundary detection, verb-object extraction, and template matching. Provide concrete technical recommendations. Address all 5 problems in CONTEXT.md.

Write to /Users/nate/Praxis/artifacts/debates/2026-04-06/workflow_builder_improvement/r1_position_a.md

jobs.label: d1_r1_position_b
jobs.prompt:
Read /Users/nate/Praxis/artifacts/debates/2026-04-06/workflow_builder_improvement/CONTEXT.md for full context.

Take POSITION B: Two-phase approach — instant heuristic scaffold FIRST then a Refine with AI button that dispatches to an LLM. The LLM decomposes steps more granularly, infers richer success criteria, suggests context packs. Address how to merge LLM suggestions without losing manual edits. Address all 5 problems.

Write to /Users/nate/Praxis/artifacts/debates/2026-04-06/workflow_builder_improvement/r1_position_b.md

jobs.label: d1_r1_position_c
jobs.prompt:
Read /Users/nate/Praxis/artifacts/debates/2026-04-06/workflow_builder_improvement/CONTEXT.md for full context.

Take POSITION C: The problem is the interaction model, not the parser. The builder should be CONVERSATIONAL — after the instant scaffold, it asks clarifying questions like 'Should scraping data be a separate step from reading documents?' and 'What criteria should the double-check verify?' This negotiates the workflow with the user. Address all 5 problems.

Write to /Users/nate/Praxis/artifacts/debates/2026-04-06/workflow_builder_improvement/r1_position_c.md

You argued Position A (better heuristics). Now ATTACK positions B and C, DEFEND yours, and identify BLIND SPOTS in all three.

jobs.label: d1_review_alternatives
jobs.prompt:

jobs.label: d1_review_platform_fit

Assess PLATFORM FIT. The product thesis is: 'Not a workflow builder. Agent operating model designer. Define intent, attach context, set authority, commit action.' Which approach best serves this? Does it feel like operating logic, not plumbing?
